zh.Chantry in Annesley church, Nottinghamsh: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾
zh.Annesley, Nottingham, England: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾安斯利
zh.Annesley, Nottinghamshire,England: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾安斯利
zh.Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾安斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Annesley於1321年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾安斯利時，他的父親John Annesley32歲，母親Amye de Gregor30歲。他於1340年與Isabella de Ireland在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾安斯利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1410年2月12日在他的家鄉享年89歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Annesley于1321年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾安斯利时，他的父亲John Annesley32岁，母亲Amye de Gregor30岁。他于1340年与Isabella de Ireland在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾安斯利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1410年2月12日在他的家乡享年89岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Annesley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ansley
meanings: habitational name from such places as Ansley in Warwickshire or Annesley in Nottinghamshire. The former is named with Old English ānsetl ‘hermitage’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’; the latter with an Old English personal name An (‘the solitary one’) + lēah. In North America, the surname may in some cases also be an altered form of Scottish Ainslie . Compare Ainsley .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Annesley was born in 1321, in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Annesley, was 32 and his mother, Amye de Gregor, was 30. He married Isabella de Ireland in 1340, in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 12 February 1410, in his hometown, at the age of 89, and was buried in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Annesley est né en 1321, à Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Annesley, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Amye de Gregor, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Isabella de Ireland en 1340, à Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 12 février 1410, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterré à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Annesley 1321 in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Annesley 32 und seine Mutter Amye de Gregor 30. Er hat 1340 in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Isabella de Ireland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 12. Februar 1410 im Alter von 89 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Annesley è nato il nel 1321 nel Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Annesley, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Amye de Gregor, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Isabella de Ireland nel 1340, nel Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 12 febbraio 1410, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolto a Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Annesleyが1321年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアアネスリーで生まれた時，父John Annesleyは32歳，母Amye de Gregorは30歳であった。1340年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアアネスリーでIsabella de Irelandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1410年2月12日に故郷で89歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Annesley(이)가 1321년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 아네슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Annesley(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Amye de Gregor(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1340년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 아네슬리에서 Isabella de Ireland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1410년 2월 12일 그의 고향에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Annesley nasceu em 1321, em Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Annesley, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Amye de Gregor, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella de Ireland em 1340, em Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1410, em sua cidade natal, com 89 anos, e foi sepultado em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Annesley родился в 1321 г. в местности аннесли, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Annesley было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Amye de Gregor, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella de Ireland в 1340 г. в местности аннесли, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 12 февраля 1410 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 89 лет и был похоронен в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Annesley nació en 1321, en Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Annesley, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Amye de Gregor, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Isabella de Ireland en 1340, en Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 12 de febrero de 1410, en su pueblo, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultado en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
